subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! What ye had written was noted, and its meanings testified to steadfastness in the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید معانیش دال بر ثبوت بر عهد و
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
